title: schismus inermis
intro: Schismus inermis, also known as prickly six weeks grass or prickly grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Schismus inermis typically involve drying the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a powder for topical applications.
